zh.lifeSummary: 當Ursula Stourton於1518年出生在英國維爾爾斯圖頓時，她的父親Sir William Stourton 7th Baron Stourton12歲，母親Elizabeth Dudley30歲。她於1534年2月12日與Sir Edward Clinton在英國史洛普爾金萊特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1551年9月4日在英國林可爾史爾斯吉爾貝可享年33歲，埋葬在英國波克夏溫莎女爵聖 格奧智也斯 查阿培爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ursula Stourton于1518年出生在英国維爾爾斯圖頓时，她的父亲Sir William Stourton 7th Baron Stourton12岁，母亲Elizabeth Dudley30岁。她于1534年2月12日与Sir Edward Clinton在英国史洛普爾金萊特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1551年9月4日在英国林可爾史爾斯吉爾貝可享年33岁，埋葬在英国波克夏溫莎女爵聖 格奧智也斯 查阿培爾。

nameMeanings.name: Stourton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  English: locative name from any of three places named Stourton (Staffs, Wilts, Warwicks).
3 English: locative name, perhaps occasionally from Storrington (Sussex), which is recorded as Storgetune in 1086.

variants.name: Sturton
meanings: 1  English: locative name from Sturton le Steeple (Notts), Great Sturton (Lincs), Sturton by Stow (Lincs), or possibly Sturton (Northumb), all of which place-names share the same etymology and early spellings as   Stratton  .

nameMeanings.name: Ursula
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin name Ursula, a diminutive of ursa ‘(she-)bear’. This was the name of a 4th-century saint martyred at Cologne with a number of companions, traditionally said to have been eleven thousand, but more probably just eleven, the exaggeration being due to a misreading of a diacritic mark in an early manuscript. This name was moderately popular in the 16th century, but its use in the English-speaking world today is selective. A more recent influence has been the film actress Ursula Andress ( b. 1936 in Switzerland).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Ursula Stourton was born in 1518, in Stourton, Wiltshire, England, her father, Sir William Stourton 7th Baron Stourton, was 12 and her mother, Elizabeth Dudley, was 30. She married Sir Edward Clinton on 12 February 1534, in Kinlet, Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 4 September 1551, in Skirbeck, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 33, and was buried in St George's Chapel, Windsor, Berkshire, England.

fr.St George's Chapel, Windsor, Berkshire,: St George's Chapel, Windsor, Berkshire, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ursula Stourton est née en 1518, à Stourton, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Stourton 7th Baron Stourton, avait 12 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Dudley, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Edward Clinton le 12 février 1534, à Kinlet, Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 4 septembre 1551, à Skirbeck, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 33 ans, et a été enterrée à St George's Chapel, Windsor, Berkshire, Angleterre.

de.St George's Chapel, Windsor, Berkshire,: St George's Chapel, Windsor, Berkshire, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Ursula Stourton 1518 in Stourton, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Stourton 7th Baron Stourton 12 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Dudley 30. Sie hat am 12. Februar 1534 in Kinlet, Shropshire, England Sir Edward Clinton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 4. September 1551 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Skirbeck, Lincolnshire, England und wurde in St George's Chapel, Windsor, Berkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ursula Stourton è nata il nel 1518 nel Stourton, Wiltshire, England, sua padre, Sir William Stourton 7th Baron Stourton, aveva 12 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Dudley, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Sir Edward Clinton il 12 febbraio 1534, nel Kinlet, Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 4 settembre 1551, nel Skirbeck, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 33 anni, e fu sepolta a St George's Chapel, Windsor, Berkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Ursula Stourtonが1518年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアストウルトンで生まれた時，父Sir William Stourton 7th Baron Stourtonは12歳，母Elizabeth Dudleyは30歳であった。1534年2月12日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアキンレットでSir Edward Clintonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1551年9月4日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスキルベックで33歳で死去し，イギリスバークシュアイアウィンドソルスト ジョージェ'ス チャペルにて埋葬された。

ko.St George's Chapel, Windsor, Berkshire,: 영국 버크실르 윈드소르 스트 조그'스 차플
ko.lifeSummary: Ursula Stourton(이)가 1518년 영국 윌츠히르 스토우르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Stourton 7th Baron Stourton(은)는 12세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Dudley(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1534년 2월 12일 영국 슈럽실르 킨렛에서 Sir Edward Clinton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1551년 9월 4일 영국 링코실르 스커벡에서 33세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 버크실르 윈드소르 스트 조그'스 차플에 묻혔다.

pt.St George's Chapel, Windsor, Berkshire,: St George's Chapel, Windsor, Berkshire, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ursula Stourton nasceu em 1518, em Stourton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Stourton 7th Baron Stourton, tinha 12 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Dudley, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Edward Clinton em 12 de fevereiro de 1534, em Kinlet, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 4 de setembro de 1551, em Skirbeck, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 33 anos, e foi sepultada em St George's Chapel, Windsor, Berkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.St George's Chapel, Windsor, Berkshire,: ст джеорге'с чапел, виндзор, биркшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ursula Stourton родилась в 1518 г. в местности стоуртон, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Stourton 7th Baron Stourton было 12 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Dudley, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Edward Clinton 12 февраля 1534 г. в местности кинлет, шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 4 сентября 1551 г. в местности скирбекк, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 33 лет и была похоронена в местности ст джеорге'с чапел, виндзор, биркшир, Англия.

Se casó con Sir Edward Clinton el 12 de febrero de 1534, en Kinlet, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 4 de septiembre de 1551, en Skirbeck, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 33 años, y fue sepultada en St George's Chapel, Windsor, Berkshire, Inglaterra.
